series.curator_notes: This is the 'Max' Hörspiel series about a young boy's everyday adventures. The series ran from 2012-2016 with 16 numbered episodes. Early albums (01-02, 06-07, 10-12) contain two shorter stories each; later albums (03-09, 13-14) contain single longer stories split into more parts. Albums 15-16 return to the two-story format. All episodes are published by Karussell.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: No overrides or splits were proposed by the first reviewer, so none to verify. The included albums are all legitimate Max Hörspiel episodes from the Karussell label (a well-known German children's record label). Episode titles match the series pattern, episode numbers are sequential (1-16), and there are no gaps. The excluded albums are all correctly excluded - they are either Christmas compilations, unrelated music albums, or different series (like LEGO City). Overall, the curation is sound.
